post.description: Document that this is an internal/system callback endpoint — it records confirmation from an external registration authority that the submission was received.

parameters.name: registrationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the registration.

400.description: The request is invalid, for example required fields are missing or malformed.

403.description: The caller is authenticated but does not have permission to record the registration submission.

404.description: The specified registration was not found.

422.description: The registration is not in Submitted state.

post.summary: Initiate a registration for a media item.
post.description: Document that a new registration begins in Draft state. Media items must be attached before the registration can be submitted.

parameters.name: mediaItemId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the media item to register.

400.description: The request is invalid, for example required fields are missing or malformed.

403.description: The caller is authenticated but does not have permission to initiate a registration for the media item.

404.description: The specified media item was not found.

409.description: An active registration already exists for this owner — only one active registration permitted at a time.

get.summary: List registrations for a media item.
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of registrations associated with the specified media item. Returns an empty list if no registrations exist or the caller does not have access to any.

parameters.name: mediaItemId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the media item.

200.description: A paginated list of registration summaries.

403.description: The caller is authenticated but does not have permission to access registrations for this media item.

404.description: No media item with the specified Id exists or is accessible to the caller.

post.description: Document the state transition: Submitted → Confirmed. This is typically triggered by an authorised admin or automated external callback after the registration body confirms receipt.

parameters.name: registrationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the registration to confirm.

400.description: The request is invalid, for example required fields are missing or malformed.

403.description: The caller is authenticated but does not have permission to confirm the registration.

404.description: The specified registration was not found.

409.description: The registration is not in Submitted state.

422.description: Domain rule violation.

post.description: Document that cancellation is available from Draft, Submitted, or Rejected states. Once Confirmed, a registration cannot be cancelled — the amendment workflow must be used instead. Cancellation releases any attached media items back to their previous state.

parameters.name: registrationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the registration to cancel.

400.description: The request is invalid, for example required fields are missing or malformed.

403.description: The caller is authenticated but does not have permission to cancel the registration.

404.description: The specified registration was not found.

409.description: The registration is already in a terminal state — Confirmed or Cancelled.

post.summary: Attach a media item to a registration.
post.description: Document the registrationId and mediaItemId path params.

parameters.name: registrationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the registration to which the media item will be attached.

202.description: Media item attached to registration successfully.

400.description: The request is invalid, for example required fields are missing or malformed.

403.description: The caller is authenticated but does not have permission to attach the media item to the registration.

404.description: The specified registration was not found.

409.description: The media item already attached to this registration.

422.description: The registration is not in Draft state; or media item is not in Approved state — only approved assets may be registered.

post.summary: Approve an amendment to a registration.
post.description: Document that approving an amendment updates the confirmed registration with the amended details and closes the amendment cycle. The registration remains in Confirmed state; a new version event is appended to the event store.

parameters.name: registrationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the registration.

parameters.name: amendmentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the amendment to approve.

400.description: The request is invalid, for example required fields are missing or malformed.

403.description: The caller is authenticated but does not have permission to approve the amendment.

404.description: The specified registration or amendment was not found.

409.description: No pending amendment on this registration

422.description: Domain rule violation.

get.summary: Search registrations.
get.description: Searches for registrations that match the specified search term. Returns a paginated list of matching registrations. If the search term is empty or consists only of whitespace, a 400 Bad Request response is returned.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The search term to filter registrations by. This parameter is required and cannot be empty.

200.description: A paginated list of registration read models that match the search criteria.

400.description: The search term is missing or invalid.

403.description: The caller is authenticated but does not have permission to perform this search.

get.summary: List registrations for a media item or by the current user.
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of registrations associated with the specified media item or created by the current user. Returns an empty list if no registrations are found or if the caller does not have access to any registrations for the specified media item or created by the user.

parameters.name: mediaItemId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the media item to filter registrations by. If not provided, registrations will be filtered by the current user.

200.description: A paginated list of registration read models.

403.description: The caller is authenticated but does not have permission to access any registrations for the specified media item or created by the user.

get.summary: Get registration details by Id.
get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific registration. Returns 404 if the registration does not exist or is not accessible to the caller.

parameters.name: registrationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the registration to retrieve.

200.description: The registration details were successfully retrieved.

403.description: The caller is authenticated but does not have permission to access the registration.

404.description: No registration with the specified ID exists or is accessible to the caller.

UploadAssetResponse.description: Represents a response to a request to get an upload URL.

preSignedUrl.description: The pre-signed URL for uploading the asset.

expiresAt.description: The expiration time of the pre-signed URL.

UploadAssetRequest.description: Represents a request to get an upload URL.

assetId.description: Gets or sets the asset Id.

contentLength.description: Gets or sets the content length.

fileName.description: Gets or sets the file name.

mediaContentType.description: Gets or sets the media content type.

mediaItemId.description: Optional. The media item Id to associate with this asset.

assetId.description: The asset Id (echoed back from the request).

uploadId.description: The S3 multipart UploadId. Required for each part PUT and for complete/abort.

parts.description: Pre-signed S3 URLs — one per part. PUT each in order; retain the ETag from each response.

partNumber.description: 1-based part index (match to partNumber in the complete request).

uploadUrl.description: Pre-signed S3 URL for this part.

expiresAt.description: URL expiry. Client must complete the PUT before this time.

assetId.description: Caller-generated UUID v7 — used for idempotent initiation.

contentLength.description: Total file size in bytes. Used to compute S3 part count.

mediaItemId.description: Optional. The media item ID to associate with this asset.

preferredPartSize.description: Gets or sets the preferred part size in bytes.

parts.description:
All part ETags returned by S3 during the individual part PUTs.
Must include every part that was uploaded. Parts may be in any order —
the handler sorts by PartNumber before calling S3.

PartETag.description: A part number and its ETag from S3.

eTag.description: The ETag value returned in the ETag response header of the part PUT.

AttachAssetToMediaItemResponse.description: Represents a response after attaching an asset to a media item.

archivedAt.description: The timestamp when the asset was archived.

ListAssetsRequest.description:
Query parameters for GET /assets.
mediaItemId is required; status is an optional filter.

ListCollectionsRequest.description: Represents a request to list collections.

Capability.description:
Domain module capabilities that a MediaProfile may enable.
MediaItems inherit behavior from their assigned profile's capability set.
Modules activate only when the required capability is present.

mediaProfileId.description: The unique identifier of the media profile to associate with the media item.

JWTBearerAuth.description: Enter a JWT token to authorize the requests...
